originalTitle: Paris police arrest more than 130 as PSG fans celebrate Champions League win over Arsenal
summary: Paris Saint-Germain supporters aimed fireworks at police officers who responded with teargas, according to reports
content: Paris police deployed thousands of officers to control crowds at some of the city’s hotspots, using teargas and arresting more than 130 people, after Paris Saint-Germain’s win over Arsenal in Saturday’s Champions League final. Footage aired on the news channel BFM showed scenes of tensions and brief skirmishes around PSG’s Parc de Princes stadium in western Paris, where more than 40,000 people watched the club win its second consecutive title on penalties at the Puskas Arena in Budapest on giant screens. By 11pm (9pm BST), police had made more than 130 arrests, Paris police said. A police spokesperson told Reuters that six vehicles and two storefronts had been damaged. Some PSG fans aimed fireworks at police officers who responded with teargas during the celebrations, according to reports in France, while some were seen wearing T-shirts emblazoned with “FU*K ARSENAL 2026” as they stood next to burning Lime Bikes on the city’s streets. Smoke was seen rising from several areas during the clashes. Police were seen sprinting after groups of fans with riot gear and stamping out flares discarded on the road. The interior minister, Laurent Nuñez, said there was a “very robust, very solid system in place” to curb violence. A police spokesperson said: “Our responsibility is to guarantee everyone a festive celebration that is calm and fully secure.” France has deployed 22,000 police to uphold order in the capital. Last year, two people died and close to 200 were injured after PSG won the Champions League for the first time by beating Inter Milan. The Champs-Élysées boulevard, which authorities had partly cordoned off, was filling with mostly peaceful PSG fans, TV footage showed. Police estimated the crowd size at 20,000. Some supporters let off fireworks and lit flares.
chineseTitle: 巴黎警方逮捕130多人，巴黎圣日耳曼球迷庆祝欧冠战胜阿森纳
chineseSummary: 据报道，巴黎圣日耳曼队的支持者向警察发射烟花，警察用催泪瓦斯回应
chineseContent: 周六巴黎圣日耳曼队在欧冠决赛中战胜阿森纳队后，巴黎警方部署了数千名警察在该市一些热点地区控制人群，使用催泪瓦斯并逮捕了 130 多人。新闻频道 BFM 播出的视频显示，巴黎圣日耳曼位于巴黎西部的王子公园体育场周围出现了紧张局势和短暂的小冲突，超过 40,000 名观众在布达佩斯普斯卡什体育场的大屏幕上观看了俱乐部通过点球大战连续第二次夺冠。巴黎警方称，截至晚上 11 点（英国夏令时间晚上 9 点），警方已逮捕 130 多人。警方发言人告诉路透社，六辆车和两个店面遭到损坏。据法国报道，一些巴黎圣日耳曼球迷在庆祝活动期间向警察发射烟花，警察用催泪瓦斯回应，而一些人则穿着印有“FU*K ARSENAL 2026”的T恤站在城市街道上燃烧的石灰自行车旁边。冲突期间，多个地区冒出浓烟。人们看到警察拿着防暴装备追赶一群球迷，并扑灭路上丢弃的照明弹。内政部长洛朗·努涅斯表示，有一个“非常强大、非常可靠的体系”来遏制暴力。警方发言人表示：“我们的责任是保证每个人都能度过一个平静且完全安全的节日庆祝活动。”法国已部署22,000名警察维持首都秩序。去年，巴黎圣日耳曼击败国际米兰首次夺得欧冠冠军后，造成两人死亡、近200人受伤。电视画面显示，当局已部分封锁香榭丽舍大街，街上挤满了大多是和平的巴黎圣日耳曼球迷。警方估计人群规模为 20,000 人。一些支持者燃放烟花并点燃照明弹。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
